## Analyzers (3)

### [DNSDB DomainName v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/DNSDB/DNSDB_DomainName.json)
Use DNSDB to fetch historical records for a domain.

- **Author:** CERT-BDF
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`

### [DNSDB IPHistory v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/DNSDB/DNSDB_IPHistory.json)
Use DNSDB to fetch historical records for an IP address.

- **Author:** CERT-BDF
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`

### [DNSDB NameHistory v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/DNSDB/DNSDB_NameHistory.json)
Use DNSDB to fetch historical records for a fully-qualified domain name.

- **Author:** CERT-BDF
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`
